meaning: n.[建]无一定尺寸限制的结构(性质)
examples: The conception of the tensegrity was proposed by Fuller, a famous American architect.
With this method, tensegrity elements can be achieved according to practical engineering.
This method concentrates on the topology of tensegrity, and it adapt for the initial process of the form find process of tensegrity.
Tensegrity refers to the balance of pushing and pulling forces--the metal pushes, the wire pulls--that work to maintain a flexible, elastic shape.
